narrative:
West Liberty-Salem Local Sd (Champaign) school district has 4,157 registered voters, with 47.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 38.2 percentage points.
